subcodes.first_line: The Lamp of God calleth aloud among you, saying: "Unto Me, unto Me, O My people and My servants! By My life, I have manifested Myself unto you." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سراج الله ینادی بینکم و یقول الی الی یا شعبی و عبادی لعمری قد اظهرت نفسی لکم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
